Verifier task (ICT__vs__ESIPT): Using external literature/precedents for salicylidene-/phenol–imine / hydrazone-like systems with strong intramolecular O–H···N/O H-bonds and donor–acceptor substitution, provide discriminator signals between ICT and ESIPT as the primary emitting mechanism. Return concise criteria and 2–5 relevant references/examples if available.
